daily_summary.headline: Exciting Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3
top_events.description: A significant launch of Falcon Heavy carrying the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite for enhanced communication capabilities.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for the Falcon Heavy launch.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Potential aurora visibility at high latitudes with Kp index reaching 4.
top_events.action: Check aurora conditions if you're at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: A demonstration flight of the new Soyuz-5 rocket, marking a significant step in Russian space capabilities.
top_events.action: Stay updated on the Soyuz-5 demo flight developments.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
